reviews.comment:
En este momento no cargan combustible a patentes extranjeros. Salvo que te hayas hospedado con ellos. El hospedaje muy lindo es espacioso y limpio. Los empleados muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
They don't currently refuel vehicles with foreign license plates, unless you're staying with them. The accommodations are very nice, spacious, and clean. The staff is very friendly.

reviews.comment:
El estado de los baños de esta YPF/ACA es una vergüenza.  Empezando por el olor fétido a orina vieja, se nota que nunca se limpian, también empapados, sin papel higiénico ni para secarse las manos.  Asco, por favor hagan algo porque como no hay otra estación de servicio en la zona quedan impunes, un poco de decencia (lejía) es lo que se pide!!!

(Translated by Google)
The state of the restrooms at this YPF/ACA station is a disgrace. Starting with the foul smell of stale urine, it's clear they're never cleaned; they're soaking wet, with no toilet paper or even anything to dry your hands. Disgusting! Please do something because since there's no other gas station in the area, they get away with it. A little decency (bleach) is all we ask!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXZ2E3bXlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención... Pero al estar en la Frontera, se empieza a sentir la falta de combustibles al incrementarse la cantidad de vehículos que pasan de Brasil a cargar y antes no lo hacían.

(Translated by Google)
Good service... But being on the border, the fuel shortage is starting to be felt as the number of vehicles crossing from Brazil to refuel increases, which they didn't do before.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcnI2VTVRRRAB
